fields.name: DISABLE
fields.description: Disable Bit DISABLE can be used for reading or setting the state of the TRNG core. The value read is always the one available at the rng core clock domain. When changing the value, the change is effective when the value read is the same as the one written.

fields.name: CLR_REVCLK_FLAG
fields.description: Reset reveal clock error flags when writing a '1' without resetting the whole TRNG. When writing a 1, the value remains until it is seen by RNG core clock domain after resynchronization. Then it is automatically reset.

fields.name: RST_HEALTH_FLAGS
fields.description: Reset Health error flags when writing a '1' without resetting the whole TRNG. When writing a 1, the value remains until it is seen by RNG core clock domain after resynchronization. Then it is automatically reset.

fields.name: CLKDIV
fields.description: Sampling Clock Enable Divider. CLKDIV[15:0] control the sampling clock enable divider, dividing by a factor equal to CLKDIV[15:0] + 1, values being in the range of 1 to 65536.

fields.name: DISABLED
fields.description: TRNG is disabled.

fields.name: ALL_OSCS_DOWN
fields.description: All oscillators of the random source noise have been powered down. This can cause the rising of OEC3 flag.

fields.name: REVEAL_CLK_ERR
fields.description: The internal clock for the RNG core is not revealed.

fields.name: ENTROPY_ERR
fields.description: The error refers to a fault in the bit sequence detected by the Entropy Monitor. Failed test is given by REPET_ERROR, and ADAPT_ERROR, OSCS_REPET_ERROR and OSCS_ADAPT_ERROR status flags.

fields.name: VAL_READY
fields.description: TRNG Value ready At least one 32-bit random value is available in the data FIFO. Note that application must ensure that a random is available in internal FIFO before starting a read otherwise a bus error will be generated.

fields.name: FIFO_FULL
fields.description: Indicates whether random data FIFO is full.

fields.name: SRC_HEALTH_DONE
fields.description: First run of noise source health test is completed.

fields.name: REPET_ERROR
fields.description: Noise source Repetition health test error.

fields.name: ADAPT_ERROR
fields.description: Noise source Adaptive 1024 health test error.

fields.name: OSCS_HEALTH_DONE
fields.description: First run of source health tests of individual oscillators composing the noise source are completed.Reserved.

fields.name: OSCS_REPET_ERROR
fields.description: Logical OR of repetition health test errors of individual oscillators composing the noise source.

fields.name: OSCS_ADAPT_ERROR
fields.description: Logical OR of adaptive health test errors of individual oscillators composing the noise source.

fields.name: RND_VAL
fields.description: RND_VAL is a 32-bit Random Value. This is the output of the internal four-word FIFO. Note that application must ensure that a random is available in FIFO by ready VAL_READY flag before starting a read otherwise a null value will be returned.

fields.name: PWRD1
fields.description: Power down of individual oscillators in triple-oscillator block number 1.

fields.name: PWRD2
fields.description: Power down of individual oscillators in triple-oscillator block number 2.

fields.name: PWRD3
fields.description: Power down of individual oscillators in triple-oscillator block number 3.

fields.name: SYNC_OSCS
fields.description: When set, selection of resynchronized output of oscillators.

fields.name: AES_RESET
fields.description: Reset AES post processing. When writing a 1, the AES post processing is reinitialized, resulting in a new key and new state generation before 128-bit random words generation. The '1' written is frozen until it is seen by RNG core clock domain after resynchronization. Then it is automatically reset. It also reruns analog source health tests.

fields.name: NB_LOOP_AES
fields.description: NB_LOOP_AES is the number of 128-bit words got from the noise source that have to be processed by AES for generating a single 128-bit random word. By default, this value is set to 2 (128 bits generated before an AES processing). 0 value means 16 loops. A new AES processing is started only when the previous one is completed.

fields.name: NB_RND_REINIT
fields.description: Number of 128-bit random words generated before AES automatically resets. This number is in the range of 1 to 65535 words. Value 0x0000 means that AES is never reinitialized.

fields.name: AES_INIT
fields.description: AES Post processing has been fully initialized (key and state) and is ready for generating 128-bit random words.

fields.name: AES_KEY_LD
fields.description: AES random key has been generated and loaded in AES key register.

fields.name: AES_BUSY
fields.description: AES core is busy, generating a random value.

fields.name: AES_HEALTH_DONE
fields.description: AES-CMAC health test is completed.

fields.name: AES_K12_ERROR
fields.description: Health test error on AES-CMAC sub-keys generation.

fields.name: AES_DOUT_ERROR
fields.description: Health test error on AES-CMAC output generation.

fields.name: DEFKEY0
fields.description: Bits 31 to 0 of AES 128-bit Default Key.

fields.name: DEFKEY1
fields.description: Bits 63 to 31 of AES 128-bit Default Key.

fields.name: DEFKEY2
fields.description: Bits 95 to 64 of AES 128-bit Default Key.

fields.name: DEFKEY3
fields.description: Bits 127 to 96 of AES 128-bit Default Key.

fields.name: REPET_CUTOFF
fields.description: Cutoff value of Repetition Test. The default value is set to 51. Caution: To be handled with care as any change can lead to misbehavior of TRNG.

fields.name: ADAP_CUTOFF
fields.description: Cutoff value of Adaptive Test. The default value is set to 699. Caution: To be handled with care as any change can lead to misbehavior of TRNG.

fields.name: ITER_ADAP
fields.description: Number of iterations minus 1 of Adaptive test during initialization phase. Default value is set to 0 i.e. 1 iteration.

fields.name: REPET_CUTOFF_OSC1
fields.description: Cutoff value of Repetition Test. The default value is set to 51. Caution: To be handled with care as any change can lead to misbehavior of TRNG.

fields.name: ADAP_CUTOFF_OSC1
fields.description: Cutoff value of Adaptive Test. The default value is set to 699. Caution: To be handled with care as any change can lead to misbehavior of TRNG.

fields.name: REPET_CUTOFF_OSC2
fields.description: Cutoff value of Repetition Test. The default value is set to 51. Caution: To be handled with care as any change can lead to misbehavior of TRNG.

fields.name: ADAP_CUTOFF_OSC2
fields.description: Cutoff value of Adaptive Test. The default value is set to 699. Caution: To be handled with care as any change can lead to misbehavior of TRNG.

fields.name: REPET_CUTOFF_OSC3
fields.description: Cutoff value of Repetition Test. The default value is set to 51. Caution: To be handled with care as any change can lead to misbehavior of TRNG.

fields.name: ADAP_CUTOFF_OSC3
fields.description: Cutoff value of Adaptive Test. The default value is set to 699. Caution: To be handled with care as any change can lead to misbehavior of TRNG.

fields.name: TO1_REPET_ERROR
fields.description: Repetition error flag of first oscillator of first triple-oscillator cell.

fields.name: TO1_ADAPT_ERROR
fields.description: Adaptive error flag of first oscillator of first triple-oscillator cell.

fields.name: TO2_REPET_ERROR
fields.description: Repetition error flag of first oscillator of second triple-oscillator cell.

fields.name: TO2_ADAPT_ERROR
fields.description: Adaptive error flag of first oscillator of second triple-oscillator cell.

fields.name: TO3_REPET_ERROR
fields.description: Repetition error flag of first oscillator of third triple-oscillator cell.

fields.name: TO3_ADAPT_ERROR
fields.description: Adaptive error flag of first oscillator of third triple-oscillator cell.

fields.name: TO1_REPET_ERROR
fields.description: Repetition error flag of first oscillator of first triple-oscillator cell.

fields.name: TO1_ADAPT_ERROR
fields.description: Adaptive error flag of first oscillator of first triple-oscillator cell.

fields.name: TO2_REPET_ERROR
fields.description: Repetition error flag of first oscillator of second triple-oscillator cell.

fields.name: TO2_ADAPT_ERROR
fields.description: Adaptive error flag of first oscillator of second triple-oscillator cell.

fields.name: TO3_REPET_ERROR
fields.description: Repetition error flag of first oscillator of third triple-oscillator cell.

fields.name: TO3_ADAPT_ERROR
fields.description: Adaptive error flag of first oscillator of third triple-oscillator cell.

fields.name: TO1_REPET_ERROR
fields.description: Repetition error flag of third oscillator of first triple-oscillator cell.

fields.name: TO1_ADAPT_ERROR
fields.description: Adaptive error flag of first oscillator of first triple-oscillator cell.

fields.name: TO2_REPET_ERROR
fields.description: Repetition error flag of first oscillator of second triple-oscillator cell.

fields.name: TO2_ADAPT_ERROR
fields.description: Adaptive error flag of first oscillator of second triple-oscillator cell.

fields.name: TO3_REPET_ERROR
fields.description: Repetition error flag of first oscillator of third triple-oscillator cell.

fields.name: TO3_ADAPT_ERROR
fields.description: Adaptive error flag of first oscillator of third triple-oscillator cell.

fields.name: EN_FF_FULL_IRQ
fields.description: Enable the interrupt when the output fifo is full of new random.

fields.name: EN_ERROR_IRQ
fields.description: Enable the interrupt when an error is reported by the health tests.

fields.name: FF_FULL_IRQ
fields.description: Set to 1 when the output fifo is full of new random. Flag is cleared by writing a 1.

fields.name: ERROR_IRQ
fields.description: Set to 1 when an error is reported by the health tests. Flag is cleared by writing a 1.

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: AES core is not initialized (no key or state set).

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: AES core is waiting for 128 random bits from the entropy sources for generating its key.

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: AES key register has been loaded with a random key.

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: At least one oscillator is ON.

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: Embedded heath monitor detects an error in bit stream quality.

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: The internal data FIFO is full and four 32-bit random values can be read.

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: Internal clock for RNG clock is present.

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: Internal RNG clock is not present.

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: No value is ready in FIFO.

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: A 32-bit value is available in the internal FIFO.
